headline: Falcons acquire safety Sydney Brown from Eagles
description: The Falcons acquired safety Sydney Brown in a trade with the Eagles in a deal that also included a swap of fourth- and sixth-round draft picks.

headline: Pittsburgh schools switch to remote learning during NFL draft
description: Pittsburgh Public Schools will operate remotely April 22-24 as the city prepares for and hosts the NFL draft.

headline: 2026 NFL draft Big Board rankings: Mel Kiper's top prospects
description: Mel Kiper Jr. is stacking the best players in the NFL draft class, starting with Fernando Mendoza. Who makes the top 25?
